description: Calculate the total Years of Potential Life Lost (YPLL) for Titanic victims using a reference age of 75 in Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis. Using the dataset at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\titanic.csv', determine the sum of YPLL for all deceased passengers (Survived = 0) with known ages. For this calculation, YPLL is defined as 75 minus the passenger's age, with a minimum value of 0. Save the resulting MEANS analysis report to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiAnalysis\ypll_report.txt'.
